/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/udpSockServer.dir/udpSockServer.cpp.o -o ../../bin/udpSockServer  ../../lib/libAppUtils.a ../../lib/libNetUtils.a ../../lib/libThreadUtils.a ../../lib/libSysUtils.a ../../lib/libAppUtils.a -lrt -ldl
